# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Continuous Deployment to Production

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

env:
  NODE_ENV: production
  APP_NAME: my-application

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Application
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 1

  test:
    name: Run Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Run linting
        run: npm run lint

  deploy:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, test]
    environment: production
    concurrency:
      group: production-deployment
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: dist/

      - name: Configure deployment credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          aws-access-key-id: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
          aws-secret-access-key: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
          aws-region: ${{ secrets.AWS_REGION }}

      - name: Deploy to production
        run: |
          echo "Deploying ${{ env.APP_NAME }} to production..."
          echo "Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          # Replace with your actual deployment command, e.g.:
          # aws s3 sync dist/ s3://${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_S3_BUCKET }} --delete
          # or
          # aws ecs update-service --cluster production --service ${{ env.APP_NAME }} --force-new-deployment
          # or
          # kubectl set image deployment/${{ env.APP_NAME }} app=${{ secrets.ECR_REGISTRY }}/${{ env.APP_NAME }}:${{ github.sha }}

      - name: Verify deployment
        run: |
          echo "Verifying production deployment..."
          # Replace with your actual health check, e.g.:
          # curl --fail --retry 5 --retry-delay 10 https://your-production-url.com/health
          echo "Deployment verification complete."

      - name: Notify deployment success
        if: success()
        run: |
          echo "Production deployment successful!"
          echo "Application: ${{ env.APP_NAME }}"
          echo "Version: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Deployed at: $(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"
          # Optional: Send notification to Slack, Teams, etc.
          # curl -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
          #   --data '{"text":"✅ Production deployment successful for ${{ env.APP_NAME }} (commit: ${{ github.sha }})"}' \
          #   ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}

      - name: Notify deployment failure
        if: failure()
        run: |
          echo "::error::Production deployment failed!"
          echo "Application: ${{ env.APP_NAME }}"
          echo "Version: ${{ github.sha }}"
          # Optional: Send failure notification
          # curl -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
          #   --data '{"text":"❌ Production deployment FAILED for ${{ env.APP_NAME }} (commit: ${{ github.sha }})"}' \
          #   ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}
